tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Would Like To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Would Like To का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I would like to know this. I would like to meet you. She would like to ask something. We would like to have a coffee. They would like to travel.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Would Like To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Would Like To का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Would you like to eat something? I would like to know more about this. He would like to give his opinion. We would like to take this opportunity. Would you like to sit down?

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "मैं धन्यवाद कहना चाहूँगा।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I would like to say thank you.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "We would like to have a coffee yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We would like to have a coffee.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Would Like To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Would Like To का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We would like to work on this project. Would you like to drink something? I would like to apologize. They would like to discuss this topic.
